name: Glade Gambrel Garage Plan - 24x36 Barn-Style Garage with Loft Potential | Large DIY Workshop & Storage Building Plans
open_features: Large barn-style architecture designed to maximize interior space while maintaining a timeless and attractive exterior profile.
The 24x36 footprint provides substantial room for multiple vehicles, tractors, ATVs, workshop equipment, or organized storage zones.
The gambrel roof naturally creates a massive overhead area perfect for a full storage loft, workshop mezzanine, or seasonal storage space.
Efficient framing techniques and logical layout make Glade achievable for experienced DIY builders or contractors seeking a versatile garage build.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Glade Gambrel Garage - a spacious 24x36 barn-style garage and workshop building designed for maximum storage capacity, durability, and timeless architectural appeal. Featuring the iconic gambrel roof profile, Glade dramatically increases interior headroom while delivering the classic charm of a traditional barn-inspired structure.
